footnote.text: Harch Corp is a sovereign infrastructure conglomerate based in Casablanca, Morocco. All financial projections are estimates and do not constitute guarantees of returns. Investing involves risk.

about.title: About Harch Corp
about.subtitle: Building Africa's industrial sovereignty, one subsidiary at a time.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Harch Corp is a sovereign infrastructure conglomerate founded in Casablanca, Morocco, with a clear mission: build Africa's industrial sovereignty through the vertical integration of AI, energy, and technology. We operate across 8 subsidiaries in 5 countries, controlling the entire value chain — from raw material to finished product.

sovereignty.title: Sovereignty
sovereignty.description: Every system we build is designed with data sovereignty and operational autonomy as foundational principles. African nations must control their own infrastructure.

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: We operate at startup speed with conglomerate execution. Ship fast, deploy fast, iterate fast — the continent cannot wait.

integration.title: Integration
integration.description: Vertical integration is our strategic advantage. By controlling the entire value chain, we eliminate external dependencies and maximize locally captured value.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: ISO compliance, SOC 2 certification, and adherence to international best practices. We make no compromises on quality, security, or transparency.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.description: A team of experienced leaders from infrastructure, technology, and finance, united by a shared vision of African sovereignty.

history.title: Our History
history.description: Founded in 2024, Harch Corp was born from the conviction that Africa deserves world-class sovereign infrastructure — designed, built, and operated by Africans, for Africa.

introduction.title: The Case for African Infrastructure Sovereignty
introduction.description: Africa stands at a historic inflection point. With 1.4 billion people, the world's youngest population, and the largest untapped resource reserves, the continent has the foundations for industrial transformation. Yet it remains structurally dependent on foreign supply chains for its most critical needs — energy, technology, building materials, and food security.

theProblem.title: The Problem
theProblem.description: Africa imports over 80% of its technology, depends on imported fossil fuels for electricity, and processes only a fraction of its own mineral resources. This structural dependency undermines economic sovereignty, creates security vulnerabilities, and perpetuates value extraction from the continent.

technology.title: Technology Dependency
technology.description: Over 80% of Africa's cloud infrastructure is hosted outside the continent, creating data sovereignty risks and latency for critical applications.

energy.title: Energy Insecurity
energy.description: 600 million Africans lack access to electricity. Those who have it pay some of the world's highest rates for some of the lowest reliability.

materials.title: Materials Leakage
materials.description: Africa exports its raw minerals and re-imports finished products at 10-100x the price, capturing a fraction of the value chain.

food.title: Food Insecurity
food.description: Despite having 60% of the world's uncultivated arable land, Africa imports $35 billion in food each year.

theSolution.title: Our Solution
theSolution.description: Harch Corp addresses these challenges through vertical integration — controlling the entire value chain from raw material to finished product. Our 8 subsidiaries cover the critical pillars of infrastructure: AI compute, energy, cement, water, minerals, agriculture, finance, and technology.

compute.title: Sovereign Compute
compute.description: Carbon-aware GPU cloud with local data hosting. African AI on African infrastructure.

energy.title: Renewable Energy
energy.description: 2GW+ pipeline in solar, wind, and green hydrogen. Zero-carbon industrial electricity at competitive rates.

materials.title: Integrated Materials
materials.description: From cement to mining, vertical control from raw material to delivery.

water.title: Water Security
water.description: Solar-powered desalination and smart networks. Solving the water crisis.

food.title: Food Security
food.description: Precision agriculture and vertical farming. Feeding the continent through technology.

finance.title: Financial Architecture
finance.description: Green bonds, Islamic finance, and carbon credits. Structuring capital for megaprojects.

competitiveAdvantage.title: Competitive Advantage
competitiveAdvantage.description: Harch Corp's integrated model creates network effects that are impossible for single-line businesses to replicate. Our cement plant feeds our construction sites. Our energy powers our data centers. Our finance structures capital for our subsidiaries. Every subsidiary reinforces the others.

verticalIntegration.title: Vertical Integration
verticalIntegration.description: End-to-end control of the value chain eliminates external dependencies and maximizes margins.

carbonAdvantage.title: Carbon Advantage
carbonAdvantage.description: Morocco's grid at ~47 gCO2/kWh provides a cost and compliance advantage for carbon-sensitive operations.

sovereignData.description: Local data hosting with GDPR and ISO 27001 compliance. African data stays in Africa.

geographicPosition.title: Geographic Position
geographicPosition.description: Morocco is the gateway between Africa and Europe, with maritime access, free trade agreements, and proximity to European markets.

marketOpportunity.title: Market Opportunity
marketOpportunity.description: Africa's infrastructure deficit is estimated at $68-108 billion per year. This is a massive problem — and a massive opportunity. Harch Corp is positioned to capture a significant share of this market through its integrated approach.

Hierarchy serves the mission, not ego

hiringProcess.title: Hiring Process
hiringProcess.subtitle: Total transparency, zero bureaucracy.
hiringProcess.description: Our hiring process is designed to be fast, transparent, and respectful of your time. No endless interviews, no unpaid homework, no ghosting.

step1.title: Application
step1.description: Submit your application online. No cover letters — just your achievements and thinking.

step2.title: Application Review
step2.description: Our team reviews your application within 48 hours. Criteria: skill, missionary alignment, and systems thinking.

step3.title: Discovery Call
step3.description: 30-minute conversation with a team lead. No quizzes, no live coding tests — just a real discussion about your journey.

step4.title: Practical Exercise
step4.description: A paid practical exercise related to your role. Duration: 2-4 hours. You're compensated for your time and work.

step5.title: Panel Interview
step5.description: 60-minute discussion with 2-3 team members. Problem-solving focused, not behavioral questions.

step6.title: Offer
step6.description: Decision within 48 hours of panel. Detailed offer with compensation, benefits, and start date.

traits.title: What We Look For
traits.description: We evaluate candidates on four dimensions, not resume keywords.

systemsThinking.title: Systems Thinking
systemsThinking.description: Ability to see interconnections and emergent properties, not just isolated components.

actionBias.title: Action Bias
actionBias.description: Preference for rapid execution over prolonged deliberation. Do first, optimize later.

resilience.title: Resilience
resilience.description: Ability to thrive in ambiguity, uncertainty, and rapid change.

missionAlignment.title: Mission Alignment
missionAlignment.description: Genuine motivation by African industrial sovereignty, not just compensation.

tips.title: Tips for Candidates
tips.description: How to stand out in our process.
items: Show, don't tell — Links to your work, not descriptions
Think in systems — Show how you understand interconnections
Be direct — We value conciseness and clarity
Ask hard questions — The best candidates test us too
Don't apologize for what you don't know — Tell us how you'll learn it

accommodations.title: Accommodations
accommodations.description: We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and provide reasonable accommodations at every stage of the process. If you need an accommodation, please let us know — it will not affect your candidacy.

gpuPricing.title: Detailed GPU Pricing
gpuPricing.description: Transparent on-demand pricing for all GPU types.

q1.question: Are there any hidden fees?
q1.answer: No. All pricing is transparent and clearly displayed. No bandwidth fees, no hidden storage costs, no surprises.

q2.question: Can I switch plans at any time?
q2.answer: Yes. You can upgrade at any time. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing period.

q3.question: How does carbon-aware scheduling work?
q3.answer: Our orchestrator monitors real-time grid carbon intensity and automatically shifts workloads to the cleanest periods and regions, reducing your carbon footprint by up to 40%.

q4.question: What is sovereign data hosting?
q4.answer: Your data stays exclusively in Morocco on infrastructure we control. No cross-border data transfer, no dependency on foreign cloud providers.

q5.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q5.answer: We accept bank transfers, corporate credit cards, and local currency payments for Moroccan and African clients.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about Harch Corp.
faq.description: Find quick answers to the most asked questions about our company, products, and services.

q1.question: What is Harch Corp?
q1.answer: Harch Corp is a sovereign infrastructure conglomerate based in Casablanca, Morocco. We operate across 8 vertical subsidiaries covering AI compute, renewable energy, cement production, desalination, mining, agriculture, finance, and technology.

q2.question: What does 'sovereign' mean?
q2.answer: Sovereign means our systems are designed with data sovereignty and operational autonomy as foundational principles. Data is hosted locally in Morocco, communications are end-to-end encrypted, and we depend on no foreign infrastructure.

q3.question: Where is data hosted?
q3.answer: All data is hosted exclusively in Morocco on infrastructure we control. No cross-border data transfer, no dependency on foreign cloud providers.

q4.question: What is carbon-aware GPU cloud?
q4.answer: Our GPU cloud is powered by Moroccan renewable energy at ~47 gCO2/kWh — among the lowest in the world. Our orchestrator automatically shifts workloads to the cleanest periods and regions, reducing carbon footprint by up to 40%.

q5.question: Which countries do you operate in?
q5.answer: We currently operate in Morocco with planned deployments in Gambia, Senegal, Mauritania, and Algeria. Our goal is to expand operations to 5+ countries by 2030.

q6.question: How can I invest in Harch Corp?
q6.answer: Harch Corp works with qualified institutional investors. Please visit our Investor Relations page to learn more or request an investor briefing.

q7.question: What security certifications do you have?
q7.answer: We are GDPR-compliant, ISO 27001 certified, and SOC 2 Type II certified. All communications are encrypted with AES-256 and our security operations run 24/7/365.

q8.question: How do I become a partner?
q8.answer: We welcome technology, financial, industrial, and government partnerships. Please visit our Partners page to learn more or submit a partner status application.

q9.question: What is HarchOS?
q9.answer: HarchOS is our unified operating system that manages the entire infrastructure portfolio. It uses a SENSE-THINK-ACT architecture for real-time monitoring, AI-powered analysis, and automated execution across all subsidiaries.

q10.question: How can I apply to work at Harch Corp?
q10.answer: Visit our Careers page to view open positions or submit a spontaneous application. Our hiring process is designed to be fast and transparent — 6 steps, 2 weeks, zero bureaucracy.

q11.question: What GPU types are available?
q11.answer: We offer a range of NVIDIA GPUs including H100, A100, and L40S series. All are powered by renewable energy and available on-demand, reserved, or at spot pricing.

q12.question: Do you offer classified government solutions?
q12.answer: Yes, our Sovereign plan offers classified infrastructure for government agencies and defense organizations, with sovereign data hosting, dedicated security operations center, and air-gap architecture available.

contact.title: Didn't find your answer?
contact.description: Our team is here to help.

cookieConsent.title: We value your privacy
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized content, and analyze our traffic.
cookieConsent.necessaryDescription: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled.
cookieConsent.analyticsDescription: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site.
cookieConsent.marketingDescription: These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant ads.
